entries.name: Basculegion
entries.role: late-game sweeper/cleaner: Last Respects scales with fallen allies
strengths: Last Respects = 50 + 50 for EVERY fallen ally (150 with 2 down), devastating with Adaptability
Aqua Jet cleans up with priority
Ghost: can't be trapped and immune to Fake Out
threatens anything that doesn't resist Water/Ghost, especially late game with teammates down
counters: don't give it free KOs: every fallen ally charges up Last Respects
notes: Fighting does 0 to it (it's a Ghost)
uncertain: Choice item +50%: to be verified in the pool (export 1 §4)

entries.name: Kingambit
entries.role: late-game anchor: comes in last and punishes Intimidate
strengths: Supreme Overlord: more fallen allies = more damage
Sucker Punch: priority against anything attacking (mind game)
Dark ×2 on Ghosts/Psychics and frail targets
counters: Fighting ×4: Close Combat/Aura Sphere/Low Kick = death (Chople Berry blocks ONE)
uncertain: Supreme Overlord as a variant: Champions tournament sets showed Defiant, with Supreme Overlord on some

entries.name: Garchomp
entries.role: Scarf revenge killer + spread Earthquake/Rock Slide
counters: Pelipper/Dragonite and Flying-types are immune to Earthquake
uncertain: Choice item +50%: to be verified in the pool (export 1 §4)

entries.name: Charizard-Mega-Y
entries.role: weather engine + special spread nuke
entries.speedNote: base 100; the bulky spread plays under Tailwind

set.setNotes: BULKY tournament spread: survives Rock Slide, plays under Tailwind

strengths: instant Solar Beam in sun surprises Water-types
special spread nuke (Heat Wave + Weather Ball in sun)
counters: ROCK ×2: Rock Slide everywhere is its executioner
steal its weather by bringing in your own setter AFTER it
Thermal Exchange (Baxcalibur) gets pumped up by its Fire moves
notes: in rain Solar Beam needs a charge turn and its Fire moves do −50%

entries.name: Sneasler
entries.role: Unburden cleaner: Close Combat + White Herb trigger the Speed double
strengths: Close Combat drops its defenses → White Herb restores them and gets consumed → Unburden DOUBLES its Speed
counters: Close Combat and Fake Out do 0 to Ghosts
extremely frail: punish it when it's left exposed

entries.name: Incineroar
entries.role: glue support: Intimidate on every switch-in, Fake Out, Parting Shot pivot

set.setNotes: variants: Throat Chop as anti-sound, Snarl

strengths: Parting Shot: debuff + pivot, BYPASSES trapping
wins positioning, not trades (almost zero direct damage)
counters: ignore it and beat the rest of the team
an Incineroar as the last mon is nearly harmless
Encore on the Fake Out locks it down
its OWN Fake Out does 0 to Ghosts
notes: in Reg M-A it does NOT have Knock Off or U-turn (removed in Champions)

entries.name: Floette-Mega
entries.role: late-game special tank/sweeper
strengths: after Calm Mind, SPECIAL hits bounce right off it
counters: ONLY physical attacks (Calm Mind doesn't raise physical Defense): Iron Head ×2, Sludge Bomb/Dire Claw ×2, Gigaton Hammer
double-target it before it stacks boosts
uncertain: Champions-invented mega: no mainline base speed exists; engine falls back to the base species roster speed

entries.name: Sinistcha
entries.role: redirects single-target hits with Rage Powder, heals, optional Trick Room
strengths: immune to Fake Out (it's a Ghost)
notes: Fighting does 0 to it (it's a Ghost)

entries.name: Sylveon
entries.role: special spread nuke: Pixilate Hyper Voice ignores redirection
strengths: Hyper Voice = Fairy spread (Pixilate) that ignores redirection (sound + spread)
counters: PHYSICAL Steel/Poison: Iron Head, Bullet Punch, Sludge, Dire Claw (low physical Defense)

entries.name: Whimsicott
entries.role: priority speed control + Encore/Taunt
entries.speedNote: base 116; Prankster gives its status moves priority
strengths: as a Grass-type it's immune to opposing powder moves

entries.name: Archaludon
entries.role: snowballing wall (Stamina) + Electro Shot cannon in rain

set.setNotes: Stamina = +1 Def when hit; Stalwart ignores redirection

strengths: in RAIN Electro Shot fires instantly (+1 SpA on every use)
with Stamina it becomes an ever-growing wall
counters: WITHOUT rain Electro Shot needs a charge turn (sun cripples it)
kill it within 2 turns or it snowballs

entries.name: Farigiraf
entries.role: Armor Tail blocks all enemy priority; TR setter that can't be Fake Outed
strengths: ARMOR TAIL blocks ALL enemy priority (Fake Out, Sucker Punch, Extreme Speed, Prankster)
TR setter that can't be Fake Outed
counters: Dark ×2 with NON-priority moves: Kowtow Cleave/Crunch yes, Sucker Punch no (it's priority → blocked by Armor Tail)
a non-priority Taunt shuts it up
notes: immune to Ghost moves (it's Normal)

entries.name: Aerodactyl-Mega
entries.role: the fastest Tailwind setter in the game + Rock Slide flinches
entries.speedNote: base 150: faster than Mega Gengar (and everything else)
strengths: the fastest Tailwind setter in the game

entries.name: Pelipper
entries.role: rain setter with Tailwind and Wide Guard
counters: steals/loses the weather on every switch-in (setter war)

entries.name: Sableye
entries.role: Prankster disruption: priority Taunt/Quash/screens

set.setNotes: set seen in Champions: Reflect/Light Screen/Quash/Rain Dance @ Roseli

strengths: QUASH: the target moves last (anti-redirect tech)
counters: Fairy ×2 is the only weakness that hits it (Moonblast)
passive: ignore it or Moonblast it
notes: Fighting and Normal do 0 to it (it's Ghost); Psychic does 0 to it (it's Dark)
uncertain: Fake Out in the set: doubtful in the source (ellipsis); the Champions set observed doesn't include it

entries.name: Dragonite-Mega
entries.role: do-it-all Mega pivot with Multiscale
strengths: Multiscale tanks one hit from full HP
uncertain: Champions-invented mega: no mainline base speed exists; engine falls back to the base species roster speed

entries.name: Maushold
entries.role: redirector support: Follow Me + Friend Guard + Helping Hand
strengths: Friend Guard reduces damage to its ally
counters: its Population Bomb does 0 to Ghosts
Follow Me doesn't redirect spread or sound moves

entries.name: Aegislash
entries.role: Ghost attacker with Stance Change: tanky in Shield form until it attacks
strengths: Shield form stays tanky until it attacks
notes: Fighting and Normal do 0 to it (it's a Ghost)

entries.name: Blastoise-Mega
entries.role: special setup sweeper with Shell Smash
entries.speedNote: base 78; Shell Smash raises its Speed
strengths: after a Shell Smash it becomes a sweep threat
counters: kill it before it sets up

entries.name: Rotom-Wash
entries.role: annoyer with no ×4 weaknesses: burns physical attackers
strengths: Volt Switch pivot in some builds
counters: no Grass on your team: neutral chip and ignore it
notes: immune to Ground (Levitate)

entries.name: Glimmora
entries.role: hazard lead with Toxic Debris

set.setNotes: can Mega Evolve; the Mega's ability is a Champions custom

strengths: Toxic Debris scatters hazards when it gets hit
counters: Earth Power ×4 from a special Ground attacker

entries.name: Aerodactyl
entries.role: non-Mega variant seen on the ladder; no dedicated entry in the source
counters: frail: see the Aerodactyl-Mega entry (rank 13) for the full plan
notes: no dedicated entry in the source: see Aerodactyl-Mega (rank 13)

entries.name: Talonflame
entries.role: offensive Tailwind setter with Flying priority (Gale Wings)
entries.speedNote: base 126; Gale Wings: Flying priority at full HP
strengths: Gale Wings: priority Brave Bird and Tailwind at full HP
uncertain: Heat Wave in the set: doubtful in the source ('Flare Blitz/Heat Wave?')

entries.name: Froslass-Mega
entries.role: snow setter + Aurora Veil

set.setNotes: fourth slot not specified in the source

strengths: SNOW + Aurora Veil: damage halved for 5 turns
counters: screens do NOT stop status or Perish
uncertain: Champions-invented mega: no mainline base speed exists; engine falls back to the base species roster speed

entries.name: Scovillain-Mega
entries.role: redirect+drain or dual Grass/Fire STAB; Chlorophyll speeds it up in sun
entries.speedNote: Chlorophyll: doubles in sun (base 75 outside it)

set.setNotes: tournament set; in the source 'Vampata' = Overheat (130 BP, −2 SpA)

strengths: Chlorophyll speeds it up in sun
uncertain: Mega ability 'Spicy Spray': to be verified in-game
Champions-invented mega: no mainline base speed exists; engine falls back to the base species roster speed

entries.name: Amoonguss
entries.role: redirector with Spore and Regenerator
counters: Grass-types are immune to Spore/Rage Powder
notes: Safety Goggles do NOT exist in Champions: Lum Berry is the only protection

entries.name: Annihilape
entries.role: snowballer: Rage Fist scales with hits taken
strengths: Rage Fist scales with hits TAKEN
Aura Sphere and Close Combat do 0 to it (Fighting → 0 on Ghosts)
counters: kill it fast, never chip it (every hit charges Rage Fist)
uncertain: set backfilled from standard competitive knowledge, not source-verified

entries.name: Azumarill
entries.role: Huge Power attacker with priority Aqua Jet

entries.name: Barraskewda
entries.role: rain sweeper: Swift Swim + Propeller Tail
entries.speedNote: base 136; Swift Swim doubles it in rain
uncertain: set backfilled from standard competitive knowledge, not source-verified

entries.name: Baxcalibur
entries.role: anti-sun: Thermal Exchange converts Fire hits into +1 Attack
strengths: THERMAL EXCHANGE: FIRE hits give it +1 Attack instead of full damage, and it can't be burned
counters: NEVER hit it with Fire (it powers it up)

entries.name: Clefable
entries.role: Follow Me support or Calm Mind setup
counters: Steel/Poison ×2 — Magic Guard doesn't block direct attacks
uncertain: set backfilled from standard competitive knowledge, not source-verified

entries.name: Delphox-Mega
entries.role: Fire/Psychic special attacker

set.setNotes: partial set in the source; Delphoxite is a Champions custom item

counters: Dark ×2 (and Dark is immune to its Psychic)
uncertain: Champions-invented mega: no mainline base speed exists; engine falls back to the base species roster speed

entries.name: Dondozo
entries.role: enormous wall with Unaware
strengths: Unaware ignores opposing boosts: an enormous wall
counters: Low Kick hits 120 BP at its weight

entries.name: Dragapult
entries.role: blazing-fast attacker with Dragon Darts

set.setNotes: item not specified in the source

counters: Fairy ×2 and immune to Dragon: Tinkaton walls it
notes: Fighting and Normal do 0 to it (it's a Ghost)
uncertain: U-turn in the set: doubtful in the source ('U-turn?')

entries.name: Espathra
entries.role: setup: Speed Boost + Baton Pass + Lumina Crash
entries.speedNote: Speed Boost: +1 Speed at the end of each turn (base 105)
strengths: Speed Boost stacks Speed every turn
Baton Pass hands off the boosts
Lumina Crash drops the target's SpD
counters: Dark is immune to its Psychic

entries.name: Excadrill
entries.role: Sand Rush physical attacker
entries.speedNote: Sand Rush: doubles in sand (base 88; mid-slow outside of sand)
strengths: in sand, Sand Rush makes it blazing fast
uncertain: Clear Amulet: doubtful in the source ('Clear Amulet?')

entries.name: Gardevoir
entries.role: special attacker with Trace
uncertain: set backfilled from standard competitive knowledge, not source-verified

entries.name: Gengar-Mega
entries.role: trapper: Shadow Tag stops enemies from switching; Perish Trap
strengths: once Mega, enemies canNOT switch out (Shadow Tag)
counters: enemy Ghosts can still switch; pivot moves bypass the trapping
notes: Fake Out doesn't work on it (it's a Ghost)

entries.name: Golurk-Mega
entries.role: Trick Room nuke
notes: Fighting and Normal do 0 to it (it's a Ghost)
uncertain: Champions-invented mega: no mainline base speed exists; engine falls back to the base species roster speed

entries.role: Prankster support: screens, Taunt, Spirit Break

entries.name: Gyarados-Mega
entries.role: Intimidate + Dragon Dance setup
entries.speedNote: base 81; Dragon Dance raises its Speed
notes: as a Mega (Water/Dark) it loses the ×4 Electric weakness

entries.name: Hatterene
entries.role: TR setter with Magic Bounce: reflects status moves

set.setNotes: item not specified in the source

strengths: MAGIC BOUNCE reflects status moves (Taunt, Perish Song, Spore...)

entries.role: defensive sand setter
uncertain: set backfilled from standard competitive knowledge, not source-verified

entries.role: support: Psychic Surge + Follow Me
strengths: Psychic Surge: the Terrain BLOCKS ALL priority + boosts Psychic moves
counters: Dark ×2 (and Dark is immune to its Psychic STAB)
notes: immune to Ghost moves (it's Normal)

entries.name: Kangaskhan-Mega
entries.role: Parental Bond attacker with Fake Out
strengths: Parental Bond: every move hits twice
Scrappy: Fake Out and Normal/Fighting moves hit Ghosts
notes: it's Normal: Ghost moves do 0 to it

entries.name: Kleavor
entries.role: Scarf attacker with Stone Axe
uncertain: Choice item +50%: to be verified in the pool (export 1 §4)

entries.name: Klefki
entries.role: Prankster support: screens + Thunder Wave

entries.name: Kommo-o
entries.role: setup sweeper: Clangorous Soul gives +1 to everything
entries.speedNote: base 85; Clangorous Soul raises Speed too
strengths: Clangorous Soul: +1 to all stats (at the cost of 33% of its HP)
Clanging Scales: 110 BP spread (−1 to its own Def)
SOUNDPROOF: immune to Perish Song/Hyper Voice, even from allies
counters: Throat Chop shuts it down (Soul and Scales are sound moves)
punish it on the Soul turn (−33% HP)

entries.name: Lopunny-Mega
entries.role: blazing-fast attacker with Scrappy
strengths: SCRAPPY: hits Ghosts with Fake Out and High Jump Kick

entries.role: Huge Power physical attacker, slow
strengths: Sucker Punch makes up for the low Speed

Protean changes its type to match the move used
utility Fake Out and Knock Off

notes: weather setter war: it steals the weather on entry, the last one in wins
uncertain: Low Kick in the set: doubtful in the source ('Low Kick?')

strengths: Guts + Facade: status powers it up
notes: immune to Ghost moves (it's Normal); its Facade does 0 to Ghosts

entries.role: sun abuser: Chlorophyll doubles its Speed in sun
strengths: Chlorophyll doubles its Speed in sun
as a Grass-type it's immune to powder moves
counters: Fire ×2 (very bad for it in sun)

entries.name: Vivillon
entries.role: sleep support: Compound Eyes Sleep Powder at 97%
strengths: Sleep Powder at 97% accuracy with Compound Eyes
uncertain: Choice item +50%: to be verified in the pool (export 1 §4)

entries.role: Illusion: comes in disguised as the team's last mon
strengths: comes in disguised as the team's last mon; revealed by the first hit it takes
